title: Fix race condition in concurrent updates
original_text: Fixed race condition in concurrent data updates. Multiple users could overwrite each other's changes. Implemented optimistic locking with version numbers. Added conflict detection and resolution. Implemented last-write-wins with merge strategy. Added conflict resolution UI. Added audit trail for conflicts. Result: concurrent updates handled correctly.
expected_subject: fix(concurrency): add optimistic locking for concurrent updates
expected_body_lines: - Implement optimistic locking with version numbers
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(concurrency): add optimistic locking for concurrent updates"
